inputs.label: Başlangıç Yatırımı
inputs.businessContext: Total initial investment (franchise fee, equipment, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total initial investment (franchise fee, equipment, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam başlangıç yatırımı (franchise bedeli, ekipman vb.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Investissement initial total (frais de franchise, équipement, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Inversión inicial total (tarifa de franquicia, equipo, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الاستثمار الأولي (رسوم الامتياز، المعدات، إلخ.)

inputs.label: Royalty Rate
inputs.businessContext: Royalty deduction as percentage of monthly revenue

businessContext_i18n.en: Royalty deduction as percentage of monthly revenue
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık gelirden yüzde olarak royalty kesintisi
businessContext_i18n.de: Lizenzgebührenabzug in Prozent des monatlichen Umsatzes
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déduction de redevance en pourcentage du revenu mensuel
businessContext_i18n.es: Deducción de regalía como porcentaje del ingreso mensual
businessContext_i18n.ar: خصم الإتاوة كنسبة مئوية من الدخل الشهري

inputs.label: Marketing Fund Rate
inputs.businessContext: Marketing fund deduction as percentage of monthly income

businessContext_i18n.en: Marketing fund deduction as percentage of monthly income
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık gelirden yüzde olarak pazarlama fonu kesintisi
businessContext_i18n.de: Marketingfondsabzug in Prozent des monatlichen Umsatzes
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déduction du fonds marketing en pourcentage du revenu mensuel
businessContext_i18n.es: Deducción del fondo de marketing como porcentaje del ingreso mensual
businessContext_i18n.ar: خصم صندوق التسويق كنسبة مئوية من الدخل الشهري

inputs.label: Operasyonel Giderler
inputs.businessContext: Monthly operational expenses (rent, personnel, materials, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly operational expenses (rent, personnel, materials, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira, personel, malzeme vb. aylık operasyonel giderler
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses opérationnelles mensuelles (loyer, personnel, fournitures, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos operativos mensuales (alquiler, personal, materiales, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصاريف التشغيلية الشهرية (الإيجار، الموظفين، المواد، إلخ.)

inputs.label: Other Monthly Fees
inputs.businessContext: Other monthly fixed fees (licenses, software, etc.)

businessContext_i18n.en: Other monthly fixed fees (licenses, software, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diğer aylık sabit ücretler (lisans, yazılım vb.)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Autres frais fixes mensuels (licence, logiciel, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.es: Otras tarifas fijas mensuales (licencia, software, etc.)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم الثابتة الشهرية الأخرى (التراخيص، البرمجيات، إلخ)

formulas.monthlyNetProfit: monthlyRevenue - operationalCosts - (otherFeesMonthly + monthlyRevenue * royaltyRate / 100 + monthlyRevenue * marketingFeeRate / 100)
formulas.breakEvenMonths: initialInvestment / (monthlyRevenue - operationalCosts - (otherFeesMonthly + monthlyRevenue * royaltyRate / 100 + monthlyRevenue * marketingFeeRate / 100))

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
